phrases.text_local: Onde fica o ponto de táxis aqui no terminal?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah oo PON-too jee TAK-sees ah-KEE noo tehr-mee-NOW?
phrases.cultural_note: Taxis are strictly regulated to operate only from designated stands.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na área externa, junto à saída.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH AH-reeuh ehsh-TEH-ruh-nuh, ZHOONNG-too AH SUHEE-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the outdoor area, near the exit.

responses.english: Good morning, in the outdoor area, near the exit.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH AH-reeuh ehsh-TEH-ruh-nuh, ZHOONNG-too AH SUHEE-duh.
responses.french: Bom dia, na área externa, junto à saída.

phrases.text_local: Podes dizer-me onde fica a plataforma cinco?
phrases.pronunciation: POH-dihsh dee-ZEHR-MIH OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh SEEN-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Platforms are numbered and located outside the main building.

likely_response.local: A plataforma cinco fica na área dos cais 1 a 12. Siga as placas a partir da bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh SEEN-koo FEE-kuh NUH AH-reeuh DOOSH KEYESH OOM AH DOH-zih. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh AH puh-ruh-TEER DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Platform five is in the area of docks 1 to 12. Follow the signs from the ticket office.

responses.english: Platform five is in the area of docks 1 to 12. Follow the signs from the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh SEEN-koo FEE-kuh NUH AH-reeuh DOOSH KEYESH OOM AH DOH-zih. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh AH puh-ruh-TEER DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.french: A plataforma cinco fica na área dos cais 1 a 12. Siga as placas a partir da bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Rede Expressos counter is
phrases.text_local: Saberia informar onde fica o balcão da Rede Expressos?
phrases.pronunciation: suh-bih-REEUH een-foo-ruh-MAHR OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DUH REH-dih ehsp-RIH-soosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Directions are often given relative to fixed architectural landmarks.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Balcão Rede Expressos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh bahl-KOWN REH-dih ehsp-RIH-soosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Rede Expressos counter.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Rede Expressos counter.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh bahl-KOWN REH-dih ehsp-RIH-soosh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para Balcão Rede Expressos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy tickets manually
phrases.text_local: Onde compro bilhetes no balcão manualmente?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih KOHMP-roo bee-LYEH-tihsh NOO bahl-KOWN muh-nooahl-MAYNG-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Manual counters are preferred for complex itineraries or senior passengers.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na Bilheteira Rodoviária do Alentejo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh roo-doo-VEEAHR-yuh DOO uh-layng-TEH-zhoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the Alentejo Bus Ticket Office.

responses.english: Good morning, at the Alentejo Bus Ticket Office.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh roo-doo-VEEAHR-yuh DOO uh-layng-TEH-zhoo.
responses.french: Bom dia, na Bilheteira Rodoviária do Alentejo.

phrases.text_local: Podes recomendar um restaurante típico perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: POH-dihsh reh-koo-mayng-DAHR OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao funcionário da bilheteira ou ao taxista; eles conhecem bem a zona.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW OW tuhk-SEESH-tuh; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG AH ZOH-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the ticket agent or the taxi driver; they know the area well.

responses.english: Ask the ticket agent or the taxi driver; they know the area well.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW foonng-seeoo-NAHR-yoo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW OW tuhk-SEESH-tuh; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG AH ZOH-nuh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao funcionário da bilheteira ou ao taxista; eles conhecem bem a zona.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Rede Expressos counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza o balcão da Rede Expressos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AW bahl-KOWN DUH REH-dih ehsp-RIH-soosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff typically give direct, concise directions without extra pleasantries to maintain queue flow.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na Sala de Espera Principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the Main Waiting Room.

responses.english: Good morning, in the Main Waiting Room.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, na Sala de Espera Principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Rede Expressos counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde é o balcão da Rede Expressos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AW bahl-KOWN DUH REH-dih ehsp-RIH-soosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Balcão Rede Expressos is a specific branded counter within the terminal.

likely_response.translation_en: Rede Expressos counter, at the end.

responses.english: Rede Expressos counter, at the end.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the taxi stand
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a paragem de táxis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH puh-RAH-zhayng DIH TAHK-seesh?
phrases.cultural_note: Taxis wait outside designated zones to avoid blocking passenger flow.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Paragem de Táxis.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh puh-RAH-zhayng DIH TAHK-seesh.
likely_response.translation_en: Where is the taxi stand? Follow signs for Taxi Stand.

responses.english: Where is the taxi stand? Follow signs for Taxi Stand.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh puh-RAH-zhayng DIH TAHK-seesh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para Paragem de Táxis.

phrases.text_local: Onde deixo as malas na estação rodoviária?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih DAY-shoo UHSH MAH-luhsh NUH shtuh-SOWN roo-doo-VEEAHR-yuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Luggage drop-off requires a claim ticket for secure retrieval.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão de bagagens.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH buh-GAH-zhayngsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the luggage counter.

responses.english: Good morning, at the luggage counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DIH buh-GAH-zhayngsh.
responses.french: Bom dia, no balcão de bagagens.

phrases.text_local: Onde encontro as máquinas de venda automática?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo UHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH VAYNG-duh ow-too-MAH-tee-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Kiosks are positioned near staff for immediate assistance if needed.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as máquinas de venda automática.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH VAYNG-duh ow-too-MAH-tee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the self-service kiosks.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the self-service kiosks.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH VAYNG-duh ow-too-MAH-tee-kuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para as máquinas de venda automática.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a paragem de táxis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH puh-RAH-zhayng DIH TAHK-seesh?
phrases.cultural_note: The taxi rank is located behind the terminal building, not directly visible from the entrance.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Paragem de Táxis.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-RAH-zhayng DIH TAHK-seesh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the Taxi Stand.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the Taxi Stand.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-RAH-zhayng DIH TAHK-seesh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Paragem de Táxis.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy tickets manually
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar bilhetes ao balcão?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR bee-LYEH-tihsh OW bahl-KOWN?
phrases.cultural_note: The manual ticket counter is inside the main hall.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the ticket counter.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the ticket counter.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a bilheteira.

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao balcão da bilheteira, na sala de espera principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh, NUH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the ticket counter in the main waiting hall.

responses.english: Go to the ticket counter in the main waiting hall.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh, NUH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Dirija-se ao balcão da bilheteira, na sala de espera principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to drop off luggage
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese bus terminals, luggage drop-off is usually at a designated counter near the platforms.

likely_response.local: No balcão de bagagem, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH buh-GAH-zhayng, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the luggage counter, on the right.

responses.english: At the luggage counter, on the right.
responses.phonetic: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH buh-GAH-zhayng, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: No balcão de bagagem, à direita.
